messages.content:
This is the **CCC** (Connect–Claude Code) project.

**Core idea:**
CCC connects Claude Code's execution capabilities to any IDE tool (Trae / Cursor / Zed / VS Code / OpenCode).

**What it actually is:**
A **SKILL asset suite** (not a framework codebase), consisting of:
- `SKILL.md` — the only prompt injected on agent startup
- 7 role skill definitions under `skills/ccc-<role>/SKILL.md`
- Plus
